# nomad_scaling_policy (Data Source)

Retrieve a Scaling Policy.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "nomad_scaling_policy" "example" {
  id = "ad19848d-1921-179c-affa-244a3543be88"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The scaling policy ID.

### Read-Only

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether or not the scaling policy is enabled.
- `max` (Number) The maximum value defined in the scaling policy.
- `min` (Number) The minimum value defined in the scaling policy.
- `policy` (String) The policy defined in the scaling policy as a JSON string.
- `target` (Map of String) The scaling policy target.
- `type` (String) The scaling policy type.
